concerns.text: FR-011 mandates a Levenshtein ratio threshold of >= 0.85 for fuzzy matching. Task T015 explicitly implements a threshold of >= 0.85, but the Plan.md constraints section (and T015's context in the plan) suggests a revision to 0.95. While T015 text says 0.85, the Plan.md constraints section (which T015 is meant to implement) states 'Levenshtein >= 0.95'. This creates a conflict where the task description matches the spec, but the plan (which drives the task) contradicts the spec. However, looking closer at T015 text: 'Levenshtein fuzzy match (ratio >= 0.85)'. This matches FR-011. The Plan.md says 0.95. The task matches the spec. No missing task here, but the Plan is inconsistent. Wait, the lens is coverage. Is there a task for the 0.95 constraint? No. The task implements 0.85. The spec says 0.85. The plan says 0.95. The task covers the spec. The plan is the outlier. No coverage gap for FR-011. Re-evaluating T015: It covers FR-011. No issue.

FR-012 requires a 'stratified permutation test OR covariate adjustment'. Task T031 implements the permutation test. Task T034 implements the covariate adjustment as 'MUST perform' and 'unconditional'. The spec allows EITHER/OR. The tasks implement BOTH. This is not a missing task, but an over-implementation. However, is there a task missing for the 'OR' logic? No, the tasks cover the requirements. Wait, the Analyze report flagged this as a conflict. From a coverage lens: Every FR/SC has a task. FR-012 is covered by T031 and T034. No missing task. The issue is scope/contradiction, not coverage. I must not flag this as missing coverage. I need to find actual missing coverage.

The spec's 'Assumptions' and 'Edge Cases' sections explicitly state the system must 'abort with a clear error message' if ground truth is missing. Task T006 creates a 'Synthetic Fallback Protocol' for missing data. This is a scope creep, not a missing task. The abort logic is covered in T017. T006 is an extra task. No missing coverage here.

FR-004 defines a 3-class label system (0=Robust, 1=Fragile, 2=Retraction-Only). Task T024 implements a 'binary' model predicting 'Fragile vs Robust'. The spec requires mapping all three statuses. While T016 maps the labels, T024 explicitly ignores the 'Retraction-Only' class in the model training. Is there a task to handle the 'Retraction-Only' class in the model? No. The spec says 'predict retraction_status' (which is 3-class). T024 says 'binary'. This is a missing task for the 3-class model or a missing instruction to handle the 3rd class. The spec requires predicting the status defined in FR-004. T024 only predicts a binary subset. This is a coverage gap for the full FR-004 requirement in the modeling phase.
FR-007 requires a permutation test with n=100. Task T031 implements 'exactly n=100 iterations'. Covered.
FR-008 requires threshold sweep over {0.3, 0.5, 0.7}. Task T032 implements 'threshold sweep over the specific set {0.3, 0.5, 0.7}'. Covered.
FR-009 requires VIF and MI calculation. Task T032 implements 'calculate VIF and MI'. Covered.
FR-012 requires 'stratified permutation test OR covariate adjustment'. Task T034 implements covariate adjustment. Task T031 implements permutation test. Both are covered. No missing task.
Edge Cases require aborting if no ground truth. Task T017 includes 'MUST check for the existence of ground truth labels; if missing, it MUST ABORT'. Covered.
FR-004 requires mapping labels 0, 1, 2. Task T016 implements 'assign label 1 (Fragile), 2 (Retraction-Only), or 0 (Robust)'. Covered.

FR-004 defines 3 classes. T024 implements binary model. The spec says 'predict retraction_status' (which is 3-class). T024 says 'binary'. This is a coverage gap. The task does not cover the full requirement of predicting the 3-class status defined in FR-004. A task is missing to either train a 3-class model or explicitly document the collapse of the 3rd class as a valid interpretation (which the spec does not allow). The spec says 'predict retraction_status' (FR-005) which is the 3-class label. T024 only does binary. Missing task for 3-class model or explicit handling of the 3rd class in the model.
FR-001 to FR-012 and Key Entities (MethodNode, RetractionLabel, TopologicalFeatures, ModelResult) are covered by T008 (data-model.md) and subsequent tasks. Covered.

Plan.md requires contracts/ directory with dataset.schema.yaml, model.schema.yaml, output.schema.yaml. Task T009 creates 'dataset.schema.yaml' and 'model.schema.yaml'. It is MISSING 'output.schema.yaml'. The plan explicitly lists 'output.schema.yaml' in the contracts directory structure. This is a missing task for the output schema.
Plan.md requires updating 'research.md'. Task T038 writes to 'research.md'. Covered.
Plan.md requires updating 'data-model.md'. Task T039 updates 'data-model.md'. Covered.
Plan.md requires 'code/', 'data/', 'tests/' structure. Task T001 creates the directory structure. Covered.
Plan.md requires Python 3.11 and specific dependencies. Task T002 creates requirements.txt with pinned versions. Covered.
Plan.md requires linting and formatting. Task T003 configures linting and formatting. Covered.
FR-001 (date range) and FR-002 (edge types) require constants. Task T004 creates constants.py with date ranges and edge types. Covered.
FR-002 (edge filtering) and FR-003 (entropy) require graph utils. Task T005 creates graph_utils.py. Covered.
Plan.md requires environment configuration. Task T007 creates .env.example and logging_config.py. Covered.

concerns.location: tasks.md:T010, T011, T012 vs spec.md:US1 Tests
concerns.text: US1 requires unit and integration tests. Tasks T010, T011, T012 scaffold these tests. Covered.
FR-001 (filter 2010-2018) and FR-002 (edge types) require extraction. Task T013 implements extract_intern_atlas.py. Covered.
FR-002 (bottleneck ratio) and FR-003 (entropy) require feature computation. Task T014 implements compute_features.py. Covered.
FR-004 (labels), FR-010 (duplicates), FR-011 (fuzzy match) require merging. Task T015 implements merge_retractions.py. Covered.
FR-004 (label mapping) requires logic. Task T016 implements label mapping. Covered.
FR-001 (abort if no ground truth) requires orchestrator. Task T017 implements run_extraction.py with abort logic. Covered.

concerns.location: tasks.md:T018, T019, T020 vs spec.md:US1 Tests
concerns.text: US1 requires test execution. Tasks T018, T019, T020 execute tests. Covered.
US2 requires unit and integration tests. Tasks T021, T022 scaffold these tests. Covered.
FR-006 (baseline model) requires training. Task T023 implements train_baseline.py. Covered.

FR-005 (topological model) requires training. Task T024 implements train_topological.py. However, FR-005 says 'predict retraction_status' (3-class), T024 says 'binary'. This is a coverage gap for the 3-class requirement. Missing task for 3-class model or explicit handling of the 3rd class.
FR-005, FR-006, SC-001 (evaluation) require metrics. Task T025 implements evaluate.py. Covered.
SC-001 (comparison) requires logic. Task T026 implements comparison logic. Covered.
US2 requires test execution. Tasks T027, T028 execute tests. Covered.
US3 requires unit tests. Tasks T029, T030 scaffold these tests. Covered.
FR-007 (permutation) and FR-012 (confounding) require robustness. Task T031 implements robustness_tests.py. Covered.
FR-008 (threshold) and FR-009 (VIF/MI) require sensitivity. Task T032 implements sensitivity_analysis.py. Covered.
FR-009 (instability) requires structural coupling. Task T033 implements structural coupling diagnostic. Covered.
FR-012 (covariate adjustment) requires adjustment. Task T034 implements covariate adjustment. Covered.
US3 requires test execution. Task T035 executes tests. Covered.
Reporting requires aggregation. Task T036 aggregates metrics. Covered.
Reporting requires plots. Task T037 generates plots. Covered.
Reporting requires final report. Task T038 writes research.md. Covered.
Reporting requires schema update. Task T039 updates data-model.md and contracts. Covered.

Plan.md explicitly lists 'output.schema.yaml' in the contracts directory. Task T009 only creates 'dataset.schema.yaml' and 'model.schema.yaml'. The 'output.schema.yaml' is missing from the tasks. This is a missing task for the output schema contract.

FR-005 requires training a model to predict 'retraction_status' (which is defined as 3-class in FR-004). Task T024 explicitly implements a 'binary' model (Fragile vs Robust). The 'Retraction-Only' class (2) is not handled in the model training task. This is a missing task to either train a 3-class model or explicitly handle the 3rd class in the binary model (e.g., by merging or excluding with justification). The spec does not allow ignoring the 3rd class without instruction. Missing task for full FR-005 coverage.
